questionHtml: Early theories of light suggest that a geometrical shadow of the slit will be observed on the screen. Explain how the diffraction pattern formed on the screen provides evidence for the wave theory of light.
markschemeHtml:
observed pattern goes beyond the rectangular shape/geometrical shadow

OR

observed pattern shows maxima/minima ✓

 

«this is explained by» interference/superposition of waves ✓

 

Accept any correct description of the diffraction pattern for MP1.

meta.title: Early theories of light suggest that a geometrical shadow of the slit will be observed on the screen. Explain how the diffraction pattern formed on the screen provides evidence for
